fields.summary: Draws the surface onto the specified canvas at the given point using the provided sampling options.

params.paint: The paint to use when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> for default paint.
params.canvas: The canvas on which to draw the surface.
params.p: The point at which to draw the upper-left corner of the surface.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling or filtering.

entries.signature: public void Draw (SkiaSharp.SKCanvas canvas, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws the surface onto the specified canvas at the given coordinates using the provided sampling options.

params.y: The y-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the drawn surface.
params.paint: The paint to use when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> for default paint.
params.canvas: The canvas on which to draw the surface.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the drawn surface.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling or filtering.

entries.signature: public void Draw (SkiaSharp.SKCanvas canvas, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);
